Great meditation app with a variety of packs for different kinds of people. One issue, though—the screen turns off during sessions. reply_content: Hello, it will be clear from the audio when the session finishes. There will be a bell, or the narrator will tell you to open your eyes or something. Try not to get distracted by the screen and just keep returning to your breath. Kind regards, Mike
